translations.### [通靈筆記] XCode 升級時最好測一下的事…\n\n: ### [Psychic Notes] Things You Should Test When Upgrading XCode…
translations.#### 故事 1 — App 一直跳邀請評價 App Popup\n\n: #### Story 1 — The App Keeps Showing the Invite to Rate App Popup
translations.#### 故事 2 — 某個頁面會直接閃退\n\n: #### Story 2 — A Certain Page Crashes Immediately
translations.***不建議直接把 Release 改成 None，因為可能會有更多其他問題。*: ***It is not recommended to directly change Release to None, as it may cause more other issues.***
translations.**有問題的話，問題多半跟開發者無關** ；是 XCode 優化的 Bug 導致: **If there is an issue, it is usually not the developer's fault**; it is caused by a bug in XCode's optimization. If you must use this version of XCode for packaging, you can only adjust your code as a workaround and wait for a new XCode version to see if the problem is resolved.
translations.*如果遇到使用者在 Release (正式版、線上版) 回報的問題(閃退或行為異: *If users report issues (crashes or abnormal behavior) in the Release (official/online) version that developers cannot reproduce locally, try changing this setting and testing it locally.*
translations.*這段程式是前人開發的，從程式上看這段程式碼雖然有 side effect，可是: *This code was developed by a predecessor. Although it has side effects, the logic is correct, it compiles properly, and previous versions ran without issues.*
translations.- Code looks correct, but results are ab:
- Code looks correct, but results are abnormal

- The app crashes in places where the code should not crash
translations.1. App Target\n\n2. Select `Build Settin:
1. App Target

2. Select `Build Settings`

3. Search for `Optimization Level`

4. Find the `Optimization Level` section

5. Set the `Debug` environment to the same value as `Release` (e.g. `Fastest, Smallest [-Os]`)

6. Build & Run to check for any issues
translations.1. When packaging and releasing with a n:
1. When packaging and releasing with a new XCode version for the first time, it's best to test this.

2. The issue only occurs in Release (official, online version). Basically, this is the problem. You can directly change the settings locally to see if it can be reproduced.
translations.> ***It is not recommended to directly c: > ***It is not recommended to directly change Release to None, as it may cause more other issues.***
translations.> *If users report issues (crashes or ab: > *If users report issues (crashes or abnormal behavior) in the Release (official/online) version that developers cannot reproduce locally, try changing this setting and test it locally.*
translations.> *This code was developed by a predeces: > *This code was developed by a predecessor. Although it has side effects, the logic is correct, it compiles properly, and previous versions ran without issues.*
translations.Build & Run 測看看有沒有異常\n: Build & Run to check for any issues
translations.Release (Testflight) 版在內測的時候發現有一個頁面(WebV: During internal testing of the Release (Testflight) version, we found that a page (WebView) would crash immediately upon clicking. However, the engineers could Build & Run on the simulator or device without any issues. Each time we suspected a cause, we would upload a new Testflight build with added logs or attempted fixes, which was very time-consuming and frustrating. This reminded me of past struggles, so I immediately asked a colleague to change the local setting to `Optimization Level = Fastest, Smallest [-Os]`. After rebuilding and running locally, the crash issue finally reproduced.
translations.不選擇直接打包上 Testflight 測試是為了方便我們遇到問題的時候，能即時: Not choosing to package directly to TestFlight for testing allows us to use breakpoints to quickly locate the root cause when issues arise.
translations.主要問題是出在我們自己特化的 WebView Obj-c Code 中有一個變數: The main issue lies in a variable within our customized WebView Obj-C code that becomes null when `Optimization Level = Fastest, Smallest [-Os]` is set. The cause is unknown, so we can only add extra checks for protection. It worked fine in previous versions, so we have to wait for a new XCode release to see if it gets fixed.
translations.以上在 Debug 環境 `Optimization Level = None: All the above work fine in the Debug environment with `Optimization Level = None [-O0]` and only occur at `Optimization Level = Fastest, Smallest [-Os]`, which is the Release setting.
translations.以下是這幾年工作中實際被這坑坑過的問題場景。\n\n: Here are some real problem scenarios I have encountered with this issue over the years.
translations.但是我們從 Code 上看跟在本地 Build & Run 在模擬器或實機上都沒: However, from the code perspective and when building & running locally on the simulator or real device, there are no issues. We also tested various edge case scenarios but couldn't reproduce the problem. I even wrote a UI Test that repeatedly runs the flow and clears data to retry... running thousands of times without encountering the issue.
translations.但當我把 `Optimization Level = Fastest, Smal: But when I set `Optimization Level = Fastest, Smallest [-Os]` and put a breakpoint to print the value, I found an anomaly: after `invitedTimes += 1`, it would suddenly explode into `-24760045646797946`, a huge negative number. As a result, the user gets the rating invitation every time.
translations.使用新 XCode 打包發佈專案之前，除了直接 Build & Run 玩玩看有: Before packaging and releasing a project with the new XCode, besides directly Build & Run to check for layout issues or errors, **please also remember to try**:
translations.使用新 XCode 版本第一次打包上版時，最好測一下這個\n: When packaging and releasing with a new XCode version for the first time, it's best to test this.
translations.其實不只被這個坑坑了兩次，有些已經不記得了，總之就是留個心法：\n\n: Actually, I’ve been caught by this pitfall more than twice, and some I can’t even remember. In short, here’s a mindset to keep in mind:
translations.問題只發生在 Release (正式版、線上版)，基本上就是這個問題，可以直接改: The issue only occurs in Release (official, online version). Basically, this is the problem. You can directly change the settings locally to see if it can be reproduced.
translations.將 `Debug` 環境也設定同 `Release` 的值 (e.g. `Fas: Set the `Debug` environment to the same value as `Release` (e.g. `Fastest, Smallest [-Os]`)
translations.我們的 App 之前有一個功能是打開 App 時會「邀請使用者去應用商城給評價」: Our app previously had a feature that would "invite users to rate the app in the App Store" when opening the app. The rule was to show the prompt three times and then stop; however, many users reported that it appears every time they open the app, lasting for a long time and becoming very annoying.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.當時先直接改掉這邊 defer 的寫法，就再也沒有使用者回報類似的問題了；後來回: At that time, we directly changed the defer usage here, and no users reported similar issues afterward; later, when testing subsequent XCode versions, the same code with `Optimization Level = Fastest, Smallest [-Os]` worked fine.
translations.程式上看不會閃退的地方，卻會閃退\n: The app crashes in places where the code should not crash
translations.程式上看正確，但結果異常\n: Code looks correct, but results are abnormal
translations.記得那次我苦惱到半夜三點多，萬念俱灰實在想不到是什麼問題，開始漫無目的的查看專案: I remember that time I was frustrated until past 3 a.m., feeling hopeless and unable to figure out the issue. I started aimlessly checking the project settings. Suddenly, I had an idea to change all the `Build Settings` to the `Release` values and try again. That's when I discovered the problem could be reproduced with `Optimization Level = Fastest, Smallest [-Os]`, which helped me locate the source of the issue.
translations.遇到僅在 Build Configuration Release (正式版、線上: Encounter ghost crashes or logic issues that only appear in the Build Configuration Release (official, online version), while Debug runs perfectly fine.
